phase_name: Sweep for and remediate other duplicate-UID collisions

objectives.description: Scan Gmail/Logos maildir folders for repeated ,U=<n> values
Corroborate and rename each additional collision's stray file
Record sweep outcome (clean or fully remediated)

approaches_tried.approach: Initial batch corroboration script filtered .mbsyncstate lines with strict len(parts)==3
approaches_tried.reason: 2-field lines (no trailing flag letter) were silently excluded, leaving 6 near-UIDs falsely appearing to have no state mapping

notes: 147 additional collisions found by the sweep (beyond UID 15 and UID 104 fixed in Phases 3/ad-hoc), all in Gmail/.All_Mail/cur only (Logos and other Gmail folders clean). 141 resolved on first pass; a parsing bug in this agent's own script caused 6 to appear unresolved. On fixing the parser, all 6 also corroborated cleanly and were resolved. Final: 149/149 total collisions (including UID 15 and UID 104) resolved with zero ambiguous/guessed renames. All renames used the same primary-IMAP-FETCH + UIDVALIDITY-cross-check + sha256-verified-in-place-rename protocol as Phases 2-3.
